verification_questions.question: Does ManageInviteLinksModal list all invite links for the group via loadInviteLinks(groupId)?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — the modal calls loadInviteLinks(groupId) on open and renders each link as a row

verification_questions.question: Does each row show label (or 'Untitled'), creation date, and a mute toggle switch?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — label falls back to copy.groups.manageLinksUntitled, createdAt is formatted via toLocaleDateString(), and a Chakra Switch controls the muted state

verification_questions.question: Does toggling mute call updateInviteLinkMuted(nonce, muted) and update the local UI state?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — handleToggleMute calls updateInviteLinkMuted then updates the links state array

verification_questions.question: Is the 'Manage Links' button in GroupDetailView admin-only?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — it is wrapped in {isAdmin && ...} and only renders when the user is a group admin

verification_questions.question: Are i18n keys (manageLinksButton, manageLinksTitle, manageLinksMuteLabel, manageLinksUntitled) added for both en and de?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — all four keys are defined in both the Copy type and both language objects

verification_questions.question: Do muted nonces cause the join-request handler to discard incoming requests?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — this was already implemented in S4 (joinRequestHandler.ts checks muted === true) and verified by the existing test 'discards when invite link is muted'

verification_questions.question: Do all unit tests pass including the new manageInviteLinksModal tests?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — 23 test files, 308 tests, all passing
